recommendations.title: Inside
recommendations.overview: An art thief trapped in a New York penthouse after his heist doesn't go as planned. Locked inside with nothing but priceless works of art, he must use all his cunning and invention to survive.

recommendations.title: London Calling
recommendations.overview: After fleeing the UK from a job gone wrong, a down on his luck hitman is forced to babysit the son of his new crime boss and show him how to become a man.

recommendations.title: Tactical Force
recommendations.overview: A training exercise for the LAPD SWAT Team goes terribly wrong when they find themselves pitted against two rival gangs while trapped in an abandoned Hangar, armed with nothing but blanks.

recommendations.title: Elections Day
recommendations.overview: The employees of a radio station in Moscow are forced to organize the elections campaign for a future governor in one of Russia districts.

recommendations.title: The Bad Guys: Haunted Heist
recommendations.overview: The crafty Bad Guys crew embarks on a high-stakes Halloween heist to swipe a priceless amulet from a spooky mansion. What could go wrong?

recommendations.title: The Getaway
recommendations.overview: A recently released ex-convict and his loyal wife go on the run after a heist goes wrong.

recommendations.title: Masquerade
recommendations.overview: A young girl struggles to survive after a group of home invaders break into her house to steal her family's priceless artwork.

recommendations.title: Money Plane
recommendations.overview: A professional thief with $40 million in debt and his family's life on the line must commit one final heist - rob a futuristic airborne casino filled with the world's most dangerous criminals.

recommendations.title: 400 Days
recommendations.overview: 4 would be astronauts spend 400 days in a land locked space simulator to test the psychological effects of deep space travel but, when something goes terribly wrong and they are forced to leave the simulation, they discover that everything on earth h

recommendations.title: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves
recommendations.overview: A charming thief and a band of unlikely adventurers undertake an epic heist to retrieve a lost relic, but things go dangerously awry when they run afoul of the wrong people.
